payload.title: Finance Committee Meeting
payload.description: Finance Committee Meeting book for March 17, 2021, containing agenda, staff summaries, financial statements, ridership data, procurement items, and real estate action items for the MTA.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Department seeking board approval for East Side Access Owner Controlled Insurance Program extension

warnings: entity.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names are relation context.

payload.description: Lessor of Jamaica Bus Terminal premises to MTA Bus Company and NYCT
Licensee for food use at 2 Broadway lobby, operating since 1994 with over 15 food establishments including Penn Station and Port Authority Bus Terminal

tool_args.label: Extension of Owner Controlled Insurance Program for East Side Access

payload.project_name: Extension of Owner Controlled Insurance for East Side Access
payload.description: Extension of the Owner Controlled Insurance Program (OCIP) for the East Side Access Project through March 31, 2023. Total additional funding requested: $48.8 million.

warnings: project.program is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Program names caused identity overmerge; they are relation context, not strong project identity. Suggested relation: part_of_program.

payload.description: Competitively negotiated contract to Slalom LLC to provide a scalable cloud-based CRM solution with integrated Knowledge Management system. Total amount: $12,650,000. Contract term: 3 years with two 1-year options. Agencies: NYCT, LIRR, MNR.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Two competitively negotiated contracts to Guidehouse Inc. and DiRAD Technologies to transform customer call centers into a transformed all-agency multi-channel MTA Customer Contact Center. Total amount: $8,694,613. Contract term: 5 years with options.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Transportation Planning and Conceptual Design Retainer Contract Panel

payload.project_name: Transportation Planning and Conceptual Design Retainer Contract Panel
payload.description: Eleven competitively negotiated personal service contracts for transportation planning and conceptual design. Aggregate budget: $25,000,000. Contract term: April 1, 2021 to March 31, 2026. Firms: AECOM USA Inc., Arup and Partners PC, Gannett Fleming, HDR Inc., HNTB, NV5, Parsons Transportation Group, Sam Schwartz Engineering, STV Inc., VHB, WSP USA Inc.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.project_name: Lease Extensions for NYCT and MTA Bus at Jamaica Bus Terminal
payload.description: Authorization to extend existing leases for MTA Bus Company and NYCT at Jamaica Bus Terminal, Queens, NY through 9/30/2022. NYCT: $22,000 per annum. MTA Bus: $245,900 per annum.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: MTA Finance Committee Meeting held at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY 10004, 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET

tool_args.label: Pricing of $700M MTA Transportation Revenue Bonds Series 2021A

payload.description: Pricing of $700,000,000 MTA Transportation Revenue Bonds, Series 2021A. $495M Green Bonds Subseries 2021A-1 and $205M Subseries 2021A-2, issued on February 12, 2021. All-in TIC: 3.052%. Final maturity: November 15, 2050.

warnings: event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

tool_args.label: Public Hearing for FFY 2021 Federal Capital Assistance

payload.description: Virtual public hearing (via Zoom) for projects proposed for federal funding for FFY 2021. Advertised beginning January 29, 2021. Thirteen members of the public gave testimony, twelve on-line comments received.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: MTA executed a 2,826,759 gallon ultra-low sulfur diesel fuel hedge with J.P. Morgan Ventures Energy Corporation at all-in price of $1.7845/gallon. Covers February 2022 through March 2023.

tool_args.label: License Agreement with Rosen's Cafe at 2 Broadway

payload.project_name: License Agreement with Rosen's Café at 2 Broadway
payload.description: Authorization to enter into a license agreement with Rosen's Café, LLC for food use in the lobby of 2 Broadway, New York, NY. Approximately 1,371 sq ft of retail space. Five year term. Minimum annual guaranteed rent of $24,000 for first year, with 3% annual increase, plus 10% of gross sales over $300,000 annual breakpoint.

tool_args.label: MNR Fare Not Collected Rate February 2021

payload.claim_text: Metro-North Railroad Fare Not Collected Rate for February 2021 YTD was 4.5%, above the 4.0% goal.
payload.statement: MNR Fare Not Collected Rate Feb YTD 2021: 4.5% (goal 4.0%). Feb YTD 2020: 3.7%.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: LIRR Fare Not Collected Rate February 2021

payload.claim_text: LIRR reported a Fare Not Collected Rate of 2.9% in February 2021, an improvement over February 2020's rate of 7.6%. Goal was 5.0%.

tool_args.label: MNR Incorrect Fare Collected Rate February 2021

payload.claim_text: Metro-North Railroad Incorrect Fare Collected Rate for February 2021 was 5.0%, down from 14.3% YTD. Goal is 14.3%.

tool_args.label: MNR Credit Card Chargeback Rate Goal

payload.claim_text: Metro-North Railroad Credit Card Chargeback Rate goal is 0.088%. February 2021 YTD was 0.025%. April 2020 increase was due to significant decrease in sales relative to chargebacks.
